[agent-runtime-abstraction] [P1] Create runtimes/claude-code/ directory structure
tasks.description:
Create the directory structure for the Claude Code runtime without moving any files yet. This establishes the target layout that Phase 2 will populate.

**Directory to create:** `apps/server/src/services/runtimes/claude-code/`

Create an empty barrel file at `apps/server/src/services/runtimes/claude-code/index.ts` that will eventually export the runtime:

```typescript
/**
 * Claude Code Runtime — encapsulates all Claude Agent SDK interactions.
 *
 * @module services/runtimes/claude-code
 */
export { ClaudeCodeRuntime } from './claude-code-runtime.js';
```

Note: This barrel file will initially fail to compile since `claude-code-runtime.ts` doesn't exist yet. That's expected — Phase 2 will create the actual implementation. The purpose of this task is to establish the directory and document the intended structure.

Also create a top-level barrel at `apps/server/src/services/runtimes/index.ts`:

```typescript
/**
 * Runtime implementations for different agent backends.
 *
 * @module services/runtimes
 */
export { ClaudeCodeRuntime } from './claude-code/index.js';
```

**Acceptance criteria:**
- [ ] Directory `apps/server/src/services/runtimes/claude-code/` exists
- [ ] Barrel files exist (even if they reference not-yet-created files)
- [ ] The directory layout matches the spec's file organization diagram

tasks.subject: [agent-runtime-abstraction] [P2] Move internal services into runtimes/claude-code/ directory
tasks.description:
Move all Claude Code-specific service files from their current locations into the new `runtimes/claude-code/` directory. This is a file-move operation with internal import path updates.

**Files to move (source -> destination):**

1. `services/core/agent-types.ts` -> `services/runtimes/claude-code/agent-types.ts`
2. `services/core/sdk-event-mapper.ts` -> `services/runtimes/claude-code/sdk-event-mapper.ts`
3. `services/core/interactive-handlers.ts` -> `services/runtimes/claude-code/interactive-handlers.ts`
4. `services/core/context-builder.ts` -> `services/runtimes/claude-code/context-builder.ts`
5. `services/core/tool-filter.ts` -> `services/runtimes/claude-code/tool-filter.ts`
6. `services/core/command-registry.ts` -> `services/runtimes/claude-code/command-registry.ts`
7. `services/session/session-lock.ts` -> `services/runtimes/claude-code/session-lock.ts`
8. `services/session/transcript-reader.ts` -> `services/runtimes/claude-code/transcript-reader.ts`
9. `services/session/transcript-parser.ts` -> `services/runtimes/claude-code/transcript-parser.ts`
10. `services/session/session-broadcaster.ts` -> `services/runtimes/claude-code/session-broadcaster.ts`
11. `services/session/build-task-event.ts` -> `services/runtimes/claude-code/build-task-event.ts`
12. `services/session/task-reader.ts` -> `services/runtimes/claude-code/task-reader.ts`
13. `services/core/mcp-tools/` -> `services/runtimes/claude-code/mcp-tools/` (entire directory)

**For each moved file:**
- Update internal imports to use new relative paths (e.g., `../../config/constants.js` becomes `../../../config/constants.js` due to deeper nesting)
- Update `../../lib/` imports to `../../../lib/`
- Update `../../env.js` imports to `../../../env.js`
- Update cross-references between moved files (e.g., `sdk-event-mapper.ts` imports from `./agent-types.js` — both files move together so relative path stays the same)

**Create re-export shims at old locations** to avoid breaking all consumers at once:

For each moved file, create a re-export shim at the old path. Example for `services/core/agent-types.ts`:
```typescript
// Backward-compatibility re-export — will be removed in Phase 4
export * from '../runtimes/claude-code/agent-types.js';
```

For `services/session/transcript-reader.ts`:
```typescript
// Backward-compatibility re-export — will be removed in Phase 4
export * from '../runtimes/claude-code/transcript-reader.js';
export { transcriptReader } from '../runtimes/claude-code/transcript-reader.js';
```

Similar re-export shims for all 12 files + the mcp-tools directory.

**Singleton instances:** The `transcriptReader` singleton currently exported from `services/session/transcript-reader.ts` must continue to be available from its old path via the re-export shim. Same for the `agentManager` singleton (handled in task 2.2).

**Acceptance criteria:**
- [ ] All 13 file groups are moved to `services/runtimes/claude-code/`
- [ ] Re-export shims exist at all old paths
- [ ] Internal imports within moved files are updated to correct relative paths
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes across all packages
- [ ] `pnpm test -- --run` passes (all existing tests still work via re-export shims)
- [ ] No runtime behavior changes
tasks.activeForm: Moving internal services into runtimes/claude-code/ directory

[agent-runtime-abstraction] [P2] Update existing tests for moved file paths
tasks.description:
Update all existing test files that import from the old paths to verify they still work with the re-export shims. Also move test files that are specifically testing Claude Code internals.

**Test files to update import paths (verify re-export shims work):**

1. `apps/server/src/services/core/__tests__/agent-manager.test.ts` — verify import from `../agent-manager.js` still resolves via shim
2. `apps/server/src/services/core/__tests__/agent-manager-locking.test.ts` — same
3. `apps/server/src/services/core/__tests__/agent-manager-models.test.ts` — same
4. `apps/server/src/services/core/__tests__/agent-manager-interactive.test.ts` — same
5. `apps/server/src/services/session/__tests__/session-broadcaster.test.ts` — verify import from `../session-broadcaster.js` resolves via shim
6. `apps/server/src/routes/__tests__/sessions.test.ts` — verify mocking still works
7. `apps/server/src/routes/__tests__/sessions-boundary.test.ts` — same
8. `apps/server/src/routes/__tests__/sessions-interactive.test.ts` — same
9. `apps/server/src/routes/__tests__/sessions-relay.test.ts` — same

**Verification steps:**
1. Run each test file individually to confirm re-export shims work: `pnpm vitest run <path>`
2. If any test fails due to import resolution, update the mock paths to match the new re-export chain
3. When `vi.mock()` is used with old paths, ensure the mock still intercepts correctly (since the shim re-exports, `vi.mock('../agent-manager.js')` should still work because the test imports from that same path)

**Acceptance criteria:**
- [ ] All 9+ test files pass without modification (re-export shims provide transparent forwarding)
- [ ] `pnpm test -- --run` passes (full test suite)
- [ ] If any test requires mock path updates, document which ones and why

[agent-runtime-abstraction] [P3] Update ClaudeCodeAdapter to accept AgentRuntime instead of AgentManagerLike
tasks.description:
Update the `ClaudeCodeAdapter` in the relay package and its consumers to use the `AgentRuntime` interface instead of the legacy `AgentManagerLike` interface.

**Changes to `packages/relay/src/adapters/claude-code-adapter.ts`:**

1. The `AgentManagerLike` interface is already a subset of `AgentRuntime`. We can either:
   - Option A: Update `AgentManagerLike` to extend from `AgentRuntime` (creates a dependency from relay -> shared)
   - Option B: Keep `AgentManagerLike` but note it's compatible with `AgentRuntime` (minimal change)
   - Option C: Replace `AgentManagerLike` with a direct import of `AgentRuntime` from shared

The pragmatic choice is **Option B** for this phase: `AgentManagerLike` already has the 3 methods the adapter needs (`ensureSession`, `sendMessage`, `getSdkSessionId`). Since `ClaudeCodeRuntime implements AgentRuntime` and has all these methods, the adapter already works with the runtime — no code changes needed in the adapter itself.

2. Update the server-side adapter construction in `apps/server/src/services/relay/adapter-manager.ts`:

The `AdapterManagerDeps` interface uses `ClaudeCodeAgentManagerLike` which is an alias for `AgentManagerLike`. Since `ClaudeCodeRuntime` already satisfies this interface, the type system accepts it. No changes needed in `adapter-manager.ts` either.

3. Update the server-side adapter construction in `apps/server/src/services/relay/adapter-factory.ts`:

Same story — `ClaudeCodeRuntime` already implements all methods that `ClaudeCodeAgentManagerLike` requires.

4. The only change is in `index.ts` (already done in task 3.1) where we pass `claudeRuntime` instead of `agentManager` to `AdapterManager`.

**Verification:**
- Confirm that `ClaudeCodeRuntime` satisfies `ClaudeCodeAgentManagerLike` (the type alias for `AgentManagerLike` from the relay package)
- Confirm that `ensureSession()`, `sendMessage()`, and `getSdkSessionId()` signatures are compatible

Note: `getSdkSessionId` on the relay interface needs to match. The runtime has `getInternalSessionId()` and a `getSdkSessionId()` alias. The adapter calls `getSdkSessionId()` directly, so the alias on `ClaudeCodeRuntime` ensures compatibility.

**Acceptance criteria:**
- [ ] `ClaudeCodeRuntime` satisfies the `ClaudeCodeAgentManagerLike` type (verified by TypeScript)
- [ ] Adapter construction in `index.ts` uses the runtime instance
- [ ] No changes needed in the relay package itself (the existing interface is already compatible)
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes across all packages including `@dorkos/relay`
- [ ] Relay path works end-to-end (if relay is enabled in test environment)

2. `apps/server/src/services/core/agent-types.ts` (shim)
3. `apps/server/src/services/core/sdk-event-mapper.ts` (shim)
4. `apps/server/src/services/core/interactive-handlers.ts` (shim)
5. `apps/server/src/services/core/context-builder.ts` (shim)
6. `apps/server/src/services/core/tool-filter.ts` (shim)
7. `apps/server/src/services/core/command-registry.ts` (shim)

tasks.subject: [agent-runtime-abstraction] [P4] Verify no Claude SDK imports leak outside runtimes/claude-code/
tasks.description:
Verify that all `@anthropic-ai/claude-agent-sdk` imports are contained within `services/runtimes/claude-code/` and `lib/sdk-utils.ts`. No other server code should import SDK types directly.

**Verification commands:**

```bash
# Find all SDK imports in the server
grep -r '@anthropic-ai/claude-agent-sdk' apps/server/src/ --include='*.ts'

# Expected results (only these files should import the SDK):
# apps/server/src/services/runtimes/claude-code/claude-code-runtime.ts
# apps/server/src/services/runtimes/claude-code/agent-types.ts
# apps/server/src/services/runtimes/claude-code/sdk-event-mapper.ts
# apps/server/src/services/runtimes/claude-code/interactive-handlers.ts
# apps/server/src/lib/sdk-utils.ts (resolveClaudeCliPath — CLI-specific, deferred)
```

If any imports are found outside these locations, update them to:
- Use types from `@dorkos/shared/agent-runtime` instead of SDK types
- Or access SDK functionality through the runtime's public methods

**Also verify no `agentManager` singleton usage outside the runtime:**

```bash
grep -r 'agentManager' apps/server/src/ --include='*.ts' | grep -v '__tests__' | grep -v 'runtimes/claude-code'
```

Expected: zero results (or only in re-export shims that should have been deleted in 4.1).

**Note about `config.ts`:** The config route currently imports `resolveClaudeCliPath()` from `lib/sdk-utils.ts`. This is a CLI path resolution utility that's Claude-specific but lives in a shared lib. For now, this is acceptable — it will be moved into the runtime when a second runtime is added. Document this as a known remaining coupling point.

**Acceptance criteria:**
- [ ] `@anthropic-ai/claude-agent-sdk` imports exist ONLY in `runtimes/claude-code/` files and `lib/sdk-utils.ts`
- [ ] No `agentManager` singleton usage outside `runtimes/claude-code/`
- [ ] `resolveClaudeCliPath()` in `config.ts` is documented as a known remaining coupling point
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes

[agent-runtime-abstraction] [P6] Run full test suite, typecheck, lint, and build verification
tasks.description:
Run all quality gates to verify the refactor is complete and nothing is broken.

**Verification commands to run in order:**

1. **TypeScript type checking:**
```bash
pnpm typecheck
```
Expected: zero errors across all packages.

2. **Full test suite:**
```bash
pnpm test -- --run
```
Expected: all tests pass.

3. **Lint:**
```bash
pnpm lint
```
Expected: no new errors (existing warnings are acceptable).

4. **Build:**
```bash
pnpm build
```
Expected: all apps build successfully (client, server, site, obsidian plugin, CLI).

5. **SDK import containment verification:**
```bash
# Verify SDK imports are contained to runtimes/claude-code/ and lib/sdk-utils.ts
grep -r '@anthropic-ai/claude-agent-sdk' apps/server/src/ --include='*.ts' | grep -v 'runtimes/claude-code' | grep -v 'lib/sdk-utils'
```
Expected: zero results.

6. **Old import path verification:**
```bash
# Verify no remaining imports of old singleton paths
grep -r "from.*services/core/agent-manager" apps/server/src/ --include='*.ts' | grep -v '__tests__'
grep -r "from.*services/session/transcript-reader" apps/server/src/ --include='*.ts' | grep -v '__tests__'
grep -r "from.*services/session/session-broadcaster" apps/server/src/ --include='*.ts' | grep -v '__tests__'
```
Expected: zero results.

7. **Smoke test (if available):**
```bash
pnpm smoke:docker
```
Expected: Docker smoke test passes.

**Fix any failures** found during verification. Common issues:
- Missed import path updates in test mocks
- Missing re-exports in barrel files
- Circular dependency introduced by new imports
- Express `Response` type import in shared package

**Acceptance criteria:**
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes with zero errors
- [ ] `pnpm test -- --run` passes with zero failures
- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes with no new errors
- [ ] `pnpm build` succeeds for all apps
- [ ] SDK imports are contained within `runtimes/claude-code/`
- [ ] No old import paths remain in production code
- [ ] Docker smoke test passes (if CI is available)

tasks.subject: [agent-runtime-abstraction] [P6] Update AGENTS.md and architecture documentation
tasks.description:
Update project documentation to reflect the new runtime abstraction architecture.

**Files to update:**

1. **`AGENTS.md`** — Update the server service descriptions:

- Replace all references to `agent-manager.ts` with `ClaudeCodeRuntime` and `RuntimeRegistry`
- Update the "Server (`apps/server/src/`)" section:
  - Replace the `services/core/agent-manager.ts` entry with `services/runtimes/claude-code/claude-code-runtime.ts`
  - Add `services/core/runtime-registry.ts` entry
  - Update service counts (moved files from `core/` and `session/` to `runtimes/claude-code/`)
  - Add `routes/capabilities.ts` to the route table
  - Update the route table to note that routes use `runtimeRegistry.getDefault()` instead of `agentManager`
- Update the "Session Architecture" section to mention RuntimeRegistry
- Update the "Client" section to mention `useRuntimeCapabilities` hook
- Update the monorepo structure tree if the `runtimes/` directory is significant enough to list

2. **`contributing/architecture.md`** — Add a RuntimeRegistry section:

- Add a section explaining the runtime abstraction pattern
- Document the `AgentRuntime` interface and `RuntimeCapabilities`
- Show how routes interact with the registry
- Update data flow diagrams to include RuntimeRegistry as an intermediary
- Document the `runtimes/claude-code/` file organization

3. **`contributing/api-reference.md`** — Document the new endpoint:

- Add `GET /api/capabilities` endpoint documentation
- Document the response shape: `{ capabilities: Record<string, RuntimeCapabilities>, defaultRuntime: string }`

**Key documentation updates in AGENTS.md:**

Replace in the services list:
```
- **`services/core/agent-manager.ts`** - Manages Claude Agent SDK sessions...
```
With:
```
- **`services/core/runtime-registry.ts`** - Registry of available agent runtimes, keyed by type. Routes call `runtimeRegistry.getDefault()` to get the active runtime. Supports future multi-runtime scenarios via `resolveForAgent()`.
- **`services/runtimes/claude-code/claude-code-runtime.ts`** - Claude Code runtime implementing `AgentRuntime`. Encapsulates all Claude Agent SDK interactions, session management, transcript reading, file watching, tool approval, and command registry. Replaces the former `AgentManager` singleton.
```

**Acceptance criteria:**
- [ ] `AGENTS.md` reflects the new architecture (RuntimeRegistry, ClaudeCodeRuntime, runtimes/ directory)
- [ ] `contributing/architecture.md` has a RuntimeRegistry section
- [ ] `contributing/api-reference.md` documents `GET /api/capabilities`
- [ ] No stale references to `agentManager` singleton in docs
- [ ] Documentation accurately describes the current file organization
